asset_type: contact sheet for academic paper framework SVG icon refinement
prompt:
Create a clean contact sheet of 25 minimalist academic vector-style icons on a white background. Use one icon per grid cell with generous whitespace around every icon, no text, no labels, no watermark. Style: consistent thin dark outline, subtle pale blue fills, rounded corners, publication-quality PPT-friendly symbols, readable at small size. Optimize each icon by its meaning, not by copying any source-paper figure. Icons in order:
1. camera frustum geometry (camera frustum, view frustum)
2. robot perception-action loop (robot perception action, embodied loop)
3. RL environment loop (RL loop, policy environment reward)
4. policy-value split (policy value, actor critic)
5. reward model (reward model, preference model)
6. federated aggregation (federated aggregation, FedAvg)
7. client selection (client selection, federated scheduling)
8. FL personalization head (personalization, local head)
9. secure aggregation (secure aggregation, privacy)
10. embedding table (embedding table, lookup table)
11. latent bottleneck (latent code, bottleneck code)
12. masked token panel (masked tokens, masking)
13. patch grid (image patches, ViT patches)
14. feature pyramid (feature pyramid, multi-scale)
15. distribution shift (distribution shift, domain shift)
16. decision boundary (decision boundary, classifier boundary)
17. uncertainty band (uncertainty band, confidence region)
18. time-series forecasting flow (time series, forecast)
19. metric dashboard (metric dashboard, score board)
20. loss curve panel (loss curve, training curve)
21. Pareto front panel (Pareto front, tradeoff curve)
22. robustness/attack panel (attack robustness, poisoning defense)
23. benchmark suite (benchmark suite, task suite)
24. caption anchor card (caption anchor, figure explanation card)
25. qualitative zoom comparison (qualitative zoom, before after detail)
negative_prompt: No source-paper labels, no equations, no metrics, no datasets, no dense UI screenshots, no raster texture, no 3D render shadows, no tiny unreadable details.
intended_postprocess: cut each grid cell, inspect semantics, then programmatically redraw as editable SVG primitives
